ViewObject.Name: XxsifyLeaveTypePicklistVO
ViewObject.SQLQuery: -- fnd_lookup_values_vl is Oracle EBS's pre-translated Language View (_vl). -- It already joins the base table with the TL translation table and applies -- LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') internally, so no explicit language filter is -- needed here. Using fnd_lookup_values directly caused blank Meaning / -- LookupCode values when the DB session NLS language differed from the one -- used during data seeding. SELECT meaning, lookup_code FROM fnd_lookup_values_vl WHERE lookup_type = 'XXSIFY_LEAVE_TYPE' AND application_id = 0 AND enabled_flag = 'Y' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN NVL(start_date_active, SYSDATE) AND NVL(end_date_active, SYSDATE) ORDER BY meaning
